name: LUXFER HOLDINGS PLC
summary: PART I Background and business overview Luxfer Holdings PLC (Luxfer, the Company, we, our) is a global industrial company focused on niche applications in advanced materials engineering. We develop and manufacture high-performance materials, components, and high-pressure gas containment solutions for customers operating in defense, first response and healthcare, transportation, and specialty industrial markets.
